Win $500! Enter by writing a dish review to help others. Drawing 3/1.
Flatlands
BOURBON & BAYOU
Bringing a Taste of the Louisiana Bayou
to Historic Downtown Alpharetta
For reservations, please call the restaurant at 470-242-5458. Walk ins always welcome!
please note, we only reserve a handful of tables daily, in an effort to maintain reasonable wait times.
we cannot accommodate parties of 10 or more on Friday/Saturday nights.
If you are interested in a private room rental- please email theflatlands52@gmail.com

meta.meta_description: Flatlands Bourbon and Bayou in Alpharetta, GA. Call us at (470) 242-5458. Check out our location and hours, and latest menu with photos and reviews.
